column_values.old_value:
(select rpad('. ', level, '   ') || b.DS_DESCRIPTION
from mw_package b
where b.nr_sequencia = a.nr_sequencia
start with b.NR_SEQ_PARENT is null
connect by prior b.nr_sequencia = b.NR_SEQ_PARENT)

select rpad(' ', level, '   ') || b.DS_DESCRIPTION
from mw_package b
where b.nr_sequencia = :nr_sequencia
start with b.NR_SEQ_PARENT is null
connect by prior b.nr_sequencia = b.NR_SEQ_PARENT

column_values.new_value:
(select c.path
from (SELECT nr_sequencia, substr(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(ds_description, ' > '),4,4000) path, ds_description
from mw_package b
where b.nr_sequencia = a.nr_sequencia
start with b.NR_SEQ_PARENT is null
connect by prior b.nr_sequencia = b.NR_SEQ_PARENT) c)
